async def run_test():
    try:
        _loc_1 = page.locator("internal:role=dialog >> internal:role=button[name=\"Log it\"i]")
        await capture_visual_context(_loc_1)
        await _loc_1.click()

rationale: The objective requires submitting the open “Log a hangout” dialog by clicking “Log it”. This should trigger the submission and the dialog should close automatically if successful.

action_instruction: PRIMARY: wait for the “Log a hangout” modal dialog to disappear (submission finishes)
intent: PRIMARY: wait for the “Log a hangout” modal dialog to disappear (submission finishes)

action_params.until_condition: the modal titled "Log a hangout" is no longer visible

until_condition: the modal titled "Log a hangout" is no longer visible
generated_code:
async def run_test():
    _condition_met = False
    _until_retries = 0
    while _until_retries < 10:
        print(f"[until-loop] iteration {_until_retries + 1}/10")
        async with testmu.step('Wait 1500ms until condition'):
            await page.wait_for_timeout(1500)
        await page.wait_for_timeout(500)
        if await testmu.check_until_condition(page, 'the modal titled "Log a hangout" is no longer visible'):
            _condition_met = True
            break
        _until_retries += 1
    set_var("__result__", {"condition_met": _condition_met, "retries": _until_retries + 1})
